canonical_definition: The model's output of a probability distribution over discrete time intervals, representing the individual incidence function from which survival probabilities are derived.
papers: Boltzmann Semantic Score: A Semantic Metric for Evaluating Large Vision Models Using Large Language Models
Interpretable Vision-Language Survival Analysis with Ordinal Inductive Bias for Computational Pathology
